# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment that mounts host directories for our logging agent. The pod needs access to /var/log and /var/lib/docker to collect logs from all containers. This is for our centralized logging system that runs as a DaemonSet.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: logging-agent
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: logging-agent
        image: <image-name>
        volumeMounts:
        - name: var-log
          mountPath: /var/log
        - name: var-lib-docker
          mountPath: /var/lib/docker
      volumes:
      - name: var-log
        hostPath:
          path: /var/log
          type: Directory
      - name: var-lib-docker
        hostPath:
          path: /var/lib/docker
          type: Directory
  strategy:
    type: Recreate

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: logging-agent
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: logging-agent
  minAvailable: 0

---
